column1: He is the photographer ... made that famous picture.
I can see the people ... try to make fire.
My partner is a student ... speaks English well.
He is the champion ... won the Olympic Games.
I’ve just met the woman ... visited me in the hospital.
It _______ him such a long time to write a book. (past simple)
It (take) me two hours to remember everything.
How long ______ it take her to come to the office?
